name: openspot-music-app
desc: OpenSpot is a free, open-source music app that lets you stream and download high-quality tracks across all your devices. With a sleek, intuitive UI built for a…
descFull: OpenSpot is a free, open-source music app that lets you stream and download high-quality tracks across all your devices. With a sleek, intuitive UI built for a seamless experience, it supports Android, iOS, macOS, Windows, and Linux — so you can enjoy your favorite music anywhere, online or offline.
